title: Three Breadsticks: 1.1190 BPB
author: newjordan
body:
## Summary
- 11L/512d U-Net with `leaky_relu_sq` activation (slope 0.5), XSA last 4 layers, bigram vocab 1536
- Legal score-first TTT with `freeze_blocks=0`, `grad_clip=0.8`
- GPTQ int6+zstd quantization, SWA, late QAT

## Results (3-seed)

| Seed | pre-TTT sliding | post-TTT | Artifact |
|------|----------------|----------|----------|
| 1337 | 1.1196 | **1.1195** | 15.90MB |
| 42 | 1.1199 | **1.1200** | 15.61MB |
| 2045 | 1.1191 | **1.1190** | 15.81MB |
| **Mean** | **1.1195** | **1.1195** | |

## Reproduce

```bash
SEED=2045 MLP_ACT=leaky_relu_sq MLP_LEAKY_SLOPE=0.5 \
XSA_LAST_N=4 BIGRAM_VOCAB_SIZE=1536 \
TTT_FREEZE_BLOCKS=0 TTT_GRAD_CLIP=0.8 \
torchrun --nproc_per_node=8 train_gpt.py
```

8xH100 SXM, 600s wallclock, ~6,900 steps.
